title: Narration Asset
description: Shared internal asset contract for the TTS narration step. Produced by the 06c_generate_narration workflow after normalizing the provider-specific API response. Used by downstream media pipeline steps (video rendering, audio publishing) and committed to GitHub as narration.json.

provider.description: The provider that generated this narration audio.

model.description: The model identifier used for TTS generation.

voice.description: The voice name used for generation (e.g. 'alloy' for OpenAI, 'en-US-Chirp3-HD-Aoede' for Google).

format.description: Format of the returned audio data. Always 'b64_json' after normalization — both providers return or are converted to base64-encoded audio.

audio_encoding.description: Audio encoding/container format of the generated audio.

audio_b64.description: Base64-encoded audio data. Null when generation failed and the asset carries only warning metadata.

char_count.description: Character count of the input text submitted to TTS.

duration_seconds.description: Estimated or actual duration of the audio in seconds. Null when not reported by the provider.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the narration was generated.

warning.description: Optional warning message set when generation succeeded with caveats or partially failed. Null on clean success.
